ASTRAL BEASTS — A FIELD GUIDE

• Beasts are bound into focus items. Equip a focus to fight alongside that beast.
• Wild beasts may be CAUGHT with Spirit Orbs or FOUGHT for experience and drops.
• Catch chance scales with your trainer rank (1–100), the orb's tier, and the beast's tier.
• Every region has a Beast Center hub: clerk, professor, breeder, orb vendor.
• Defeat a gym leader for the region Crest, then the champion to open the next region.
• Team Eclipse runs a hideout in every region. Their Admin guards an evolution stone.

message: Welcome to Ashbridge. I study the Cinderkin of scorched plains and basalt fields. Take this folio — it is the Emberlands Dex.
Emberlands is a land of scorched plains and basalt fields. The Cinderkin thrive here. Defeat Pyralis at the gym, then Champion Ignara, and the road north opens.
Beast Center, Ashbridge branch. Your beasts can rest here at no charge. Travel back to the Console at any time.

Bring me an evolution stone — Cinderkin Stone or a Resonant Shard — and a beast that is ready, and I will guide it to its next form. Bring two compatible beasts and a Pair Incense, and I will leave you with an egg.
Which beast?
Cindlet pulses, draws in the stone, and reshapes into Pyrrun.
Pyrrun pulses, draws in the stone, and reshapes into Ignifex.
Smokrat pulses, draws in the stone, and reshapes into Smoulkin.
Two Cinderkin beasts and a Pair Incense — and an egg comes home with you.
Spirit Orbs, all tiers. What will it be?
I am Pyralis, leader of the Ashbridge Gym. Show me what you have built.
I am Ignara, Champion of Emberlands. The next region waits beyond me.
I am Admin Solrin of Team Eclipse. We will dim the sky over Emberlands whether you like it or not.
Team Eclipse owns this hideout. Out.

I am the keeper of Saltspire Light. The lantern bead fell into the surf last storm, and I cannot raise the flame without it. The pearl diver down the route fishes such things up — go and ask her.
You found one — and so quickly. The lantern remembers its flame. Take this with my thanks; the orbs were a gift from the Beast Center, and they sit better in a trainer's pack than on my shelf.
Tideholm sees more travellers than it used to. What brings you to the shallows?

replies.text: The keeper sent me — sell me a lantern bead.
Tell me about the Pearl Survey.

message: A bead for two hundred gold. The tides decide the price, not me.
The Survey is simple: walk the gym circuit, take the Tideholm Crest from Marenna, and bring it back to me. The tides remember every trainer who has done it.
Tideholm Crest in hand. The Survey is yours. Take this Pearl Token — the gym leaders of Verdant Reach and Stormcrest accept it as introduction.
